case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY BARRISH BAIL BONDS $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,080.00
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY BARRISH BAIL BONDS
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
